 select ID,FULL_NAME,EMAIL,TRANSACTION_DATE,UPPER(TRANSACTION_TYPE) AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,SALARY,AGE from ORACLETRANEE.TARGET_TRANSACTIONS"},"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.JDBCComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"Oracle_test","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"partitionOptions":{"partitionType":"","name":""},"enableTrim":"N","easyQueryDefJson":{"sqlQuery":""},"isAutoRepartition":"Y","databaseName":"","failComponentWhenDatasetEmpty":"N","maskDataColumns":"","componentId":5,"componentName":"JDBC 5","tableName":"JDBC_5","category":"Source","componentType":"JDBC","rank":0,"dataSourceName":"","displayRows":50,"dependencies":[],"options":{"dbTable":"select ACCOUNT_ID,CUSTOMER_NAME,ACCOUNT_TYPE,BRANCH_CITY from ORACLETRANEE.ACCOUNT_CUSTOMERS"},"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.JDBCComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"Oracle_test","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"partitionOptions":{"partitionType":"","name":""},"easyQueryDefJson":{"sqlQuery":""},"componentId":3,"componentName":"transformations","tableName":"transformations","category":"Processor","componentType":"SQL","rank":0,"dataSourceName":"","displayRows":50,"dependencies":[1],"options":{"dbTable":"
SELECT
id,

first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(last_name,'Unknown') AS full_name,

COALESCE(email,'unknown@email.com') AS email,

TO_DATE(transaction_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS transaction_date,

UPPER(transaction_type) as transaction_type,

CASE
WHEN salary < 0 THEN ABS(salary)
WHEN salary IS NULL THEN 40000
ELSE salary
END AS salary,

CASE
WHEN age < 18 OR age > 100 THEN 30
WHEN age IS NULL THEN 30
ELSE age
END AS age

FROM source;"},"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.SQLComponent","executionOption":"allparentpassorfail","excludeNotification":"N"},{"sourceDataFrame":"target","targetDataFrame":"transformations","mapping":[{"sourceColumn":"ID","sourceType":"decimal(38,0)","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"decimal(38,0)","targetColumn":"id","targetType":"integer","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"integer","unique":"Y","columnOrder":0},{"sourceColumn":"FULL_NAME","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"full_name","targetType":"string","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"string","unique":"N","columnOrder":1},{"sourceColumn":"EMAIL","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"email","targetType":"string","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"string","unique":"N","columnOrder":2},{"sourceColumn":"TRANSACTION_DATE","sourceType":"timestamp","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"timestamp","targetColumn":"transaction_date","targetType":"date","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"date","unique":"N","columnOrder":3},{"sourceColumn":"TRANSACTION_TYPE","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"transaction_type","targetType":"string","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"string","unique":"N","columnOrder":4},{"sourceColumn":"SALARY","sourceType":"decimal(38,0)","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"decimal(38,0)","targetColumn":"salary","targetType":"integer","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"integer","unique":"N","columnOrder":5},{"sourceColumn":"AGE","sourceType":"decimal(38,0)","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange
